## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature in concrete terms.

## Validation Plan
How will we know this works?

## Risk Notes
List any risk to auditability, reproducibility, or claim discipline.

## Roadmap Alignment
Which roadmap track or milestone does this support?
